## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

List the modules, pages, or files affected.

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Validation

Commands run:

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] npm run dev (if runtime behavior changed)

Manual checks performed:

- [ ] Smoke Testing
- [ ] Functional Testing
- [ ] Integration Testing (if applicable)
- [ ] UI Testing
- [ ] Security Testing (if applicable)
- [ ] Stress Testing (if applicable)
- [ ] Load Testing (if applicable)

## Risk Assessment

Describe potential regressions and how they were mitigated.

## Screenshots or Evidence

Add screenshots, recordings, logs, or sample payloads when applicable.

## Follow-ups

List deferred work, known limitations, or next actions.
